headline: Corning Could Hit $144 by End of 2026 — BofA Sees $10.3B Scale-Out Revenue as the Catalyst
summary: Corning (NYSE:GLW) has been one of the market’s standout performers over the past year, with shares up nearly 187% over the past 12 months and nearly 44% year-to-date. The stock touched a 52-week high of $162.10 before pulling back, and currently trades near $130.07. Wall Street’s consensus sits at $126.46 analyst target, with most analysts ... Corning Could Hit $144 by End of 2026 — BofA Sees $10.3B Scale-Out Revenue as the Catalyst

headline: Corning Expands AI Data Center Portfolio: Will it Drive Growth?
summary: GLW licenses PRIZM TMT ferrule tech from US Conec, boosting high-density optical connectivity to support growing AI data center networks.

headline: How Is Corning's Stock Performance Compared to Other Technology Stocks
summary: Corning has outperformed its technology peers over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s growth potential.

headline: Corning Incorporated (GLW) Gains on Strong GenAI-Driven Optical Communications Demand
summary: The London Company, an investment management company, released its “Income Equity Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Fund’s Income Equity Portfolio declined 1.4% gross (-1.6% net) in the fourth quarter of 2025, underperforming the Russell 1000 Value Index, which gained 3.8%, as stock selection weighed on […]

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Corning, Raises Price Target to $144
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Wamsi Mohan   maintains Corning (NYSE:GLW) with a Buy and raises the price target from $120 to $144.
